Internshala for employers

Looking to hire freshers and interns?

Access India's largest talent pool of 3.2 crore+ candidates with AI-powered tools and smart filters to hire faster.

28,48,723 + placements - read their stories

Go-to platform for students and freshers

I landed my first internship from Internshala! This app has opportunities for every student and is a must-have for students looking to build their careers.
Yogesh Singh
Placed in Flipkart

Got my dream job at Amazon!

I applied to Amazon and got the job! It was my dream. I wanted to get into tech but I was from an electrical background. I learned the skills, which came in handy in my interviews. Thanks to Internshala, I was able to explain the concepts and applications well. They helped me with everything.
Yaswanth Mandapati
Placed in Amazon

Turning doubts into success

I had no idea how to enter the corporate world, what kind of job would be a good fit for me, or where to even start. Internshala guided me through the entire process, helping me build the right skills and confidence. Thanks to their support and resources, I was able to secure an internship, which eventually led to a job offer from Flipkart.
Pankaj
Placed in Star Health and Allied Insurance Co. Ltd

Got an internship at Flipkart

After facing disappointments from campus placement rejections, I turned to Internshala. I learned valuable skills, how to crack interviews, and how to make a strong resume through their guidance. A few months later, I secured a data science internship with Flipkart. It's my first job after graduation. The office is huge, and I love it here!
Tharun Kumar
Placed in Flipkart

Good support and doubt solving

What stood out for me was the quick resolution of my doubts and queries. Internshala gave me all the support I needed to restart my career - from sharing placement opportunities to interview preparation.
Kala Chaithanya Velagapudi
Placed in EmergentX

5+ internships and job offers!

Got over 5 internships via Internshala during college—ended up with a job offer that beats market standards. All thanks to Internshala
Nabeel Arts

First choice for job search

Internshala has helped me get internship offers & tons of recruiter calls for jobs. Even now, It's my first choice now for job hunting and exploring good job opportunities.
Preethika Anand

Got hired for 4 internships

Internshala helped me get 4 internships in different fields. Highly recommended for students looking for good internships and job opportunities.
Ananya Pratap Singh

Proud partner of leading government bodies

Skill India

NSDC

IIT Madras

MESC

NIELIT

AICTE
